note: NAIC Model 582 illustration self-support test. Vector 1: pass (positive AV at yr15 and yr20). Vector 2: fail (negative AV at yr15 and yr20). Both branches needed for life-illustration-self-support-test linear chain.

vectors.name: illustration_passes_both_tests
vectors.description: UL policy with steadily growing account value. AV yr15=$1500, yr20=$2000, both positive. Self-support tests pass. No lapse rates supplied so lapse_support_flag=false. illustration_valid=true.

output_payload.table_source: NAIC Model Regulation 582 §8C Self-Support Test; §8D Lapse-Support Test; ASOP 24 (2014); NAIC Life Insurance Illustrations Model Regulation (2001 revision)
output_payload.regulatory_basis: NAIC Model Regulation 582 §8C (self-support test at year 15 and year 20) and §8D (lapse-support prohibition); ASOP 24 (Actuarial Standard of Practice for Illustrations). Applicable to life insurance illustration requirements in all US states adopting Model 582.
output_payload.pii_note: ZERO PII: projected cash flows and policy mechanics only. No policyholder name, age, health classification, or personal data enters this kernel.
output_payload.not_legal_advice: Not legal or actuarial advice. Final illustration certification requires review and sign-off by a qualified actuary per ASOP 24 and applicable state regulations.

vectors.name: illustration_fails_selfsupport
vectors.description: Policy with deteriorating account value. AV peaks at year 5, declines to -500 at yr15 and -1000 at yr20. Both self-support tests fail. illustration_valid=false. Covers the test-fail path.

issues: Year-15 self-support test FAIL: projected account value < 0 at year 15
Year-20 self-support test FAIL: projected account value < 0 at year 20
output_payload.table_source: NAIC Model Regulation 582 §8C Self-Support Test; §8D Lapse-Support Test; ASOP 24 (2014); NAIC Life Insurance Illustrations Model Regulation (2001 revision)
output_payload.regulatory_basis: NAIC Model Regulation 582 §8C (self-support test at year 15 and year 20) and §8D (lapse-support prohibition); ASOP 24 (Actuarial Standard of Practice for Illustrations). Applicable to life insurance illustration requirements in all US states adopting Model 582.
